title: SoundHound AI (SOUN) Stock: Q1 Earnings Preview and Volatility Outlook
text: Ahead of SoundHound AI's Q1 2026 earnings announcement, market participants anticipated significant volatility given the stock's beta of 2.7 and recent 20.6% year-to-date decline. Analysts expected the company to report revenue growth driven by strong demand in automotive, IoT, and enterprise AI markets. The company was anticipated to deliver Q1 revenue in the range of $42-44 million, representing 50%+ year-over-year growth. Key focus areas for the earnings call included gross margin trajectory, progress on achieving profitability, and details on the LivePerson acquisition announced in April. Management's guidance for 2026 and 2027 revenue was expected to provide clarity on the combined company's growth prospects. The stock's high volatility reflects investor concerns about profitability challenges despite strong top-line growth, typical of high-growth AI companies navigating the transition to scale.
